

# **<u>About Me</u>**


<center>
# Hello, I am [Eduardo Ramirez](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eduardo-ramirez-0b87a0263/).
</center>

I currently attend California State University, Long Beach with a focus on Global Studies. My work explores how environmental conditions, spatial patterns, and human systems interact across regions and communities.

My work also demonstrates how spatial analysis and GIS can be leveraged to better support communities and municipalities by identifying patterns, revealing disparities, and informing more effective regional decision-making. 

Alongside my academic work, I support school sites in the Los Angeles region analyze attendance patterns and identify barriers that affect student attendance. I actively engage with school communities, working directly with students and families to address challenges and support improved attendance outcomes. Through both analysis and community engagement, I help schools better understand the barriers families face and support strategies to meet regional attendance growth goals.

### **<u>Contact</u>**
  - Phone: (213)447-1549
  - Email: eduardoramirez90280@gmail.com
  
![](img/IMG_5026.png)
